changes.value:
## What
Module: `directory`. Source: `input.workspace.current_dir`. Default format: `$path`.

Extracts basename of cwd. Config: `truncation_length` (default 1 = last component), `style` (default "cyan bold").

File: `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/directory.rs`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Shows basename of workspace dir
- [ ] Configurable format, style, truncation_length
- [ ] Returns None if no cwd available

## Tests
- [ ] Test with full path, verify basename
- [ ] Test with absent cwd returns None
- [ ] Test custom format string
